summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Plan-based Feature Gating, Subscription Management, and Audit Logs. All 18 test cases from the request passed. Backend APIs 100% functional (29/29 pytest tests passed). Frontend UI fully operational with all workflows tested.
passed_tests: 1. Login as HR (hr@acmecorp.com / password123) - currently on Enterprise plan ✓
2. Backend: GET /api/subscription/current returns plan=enterprise, employee_count, limits with features list ✓
3. Backend: GET /api/audit-logs returns logs with UPGRADE entries from subscription changes ✓
4. Sidebar: All nav items visible without lock icons (Enterprise has all features) ✓
5. Audit Logs page (/audit-logs): Table shows audit entries with Timestamp, User, Action, Resource, Details columns ✓
6. Audit Logs: Filter by action dropdown works (All Actions, Create, Upgrade etc) ✓
7. Subscription page (/subscription): Shows 'Enterprise Plan' header with '1 / Unlimited employees' and '14 features enabled' ✓
8. Subscription page: 4 plan cards show correct USD prices - Free Trial $0, Starter $49, Professional $99, Enterprise $199 ✓
9. Subscription page: Enterprise card shows 'Current' badge, lower plans show 'Included' ✓
10. DOWNGRADED to free_trial: Backend middleware blocks payroll (POST /api/payroll) with 403 PLAN_UPGRADE_REQUIRED ✓
11. Downgraded: Sidebar shows lock icons on Payroll, Timesheets, Recruitment, Projects, Audit Logs ✓
12. Downgraded: Navigating to /payroll shows 'Feature Locked' card with 'This feature requires the Starter plan' ✓
13. Downgraded: Navigating to /audit-logs shows 'Feature Locked' card with 'This feature requires the Enterprise plan' ✓
14. Downgraded: Navigating to /recruitment shows 'Feature Locked' card with 'This feature requires the Professional plan' ✓
15. Downgraded: Dashboard, Employees, Attendance, Leaves still accessible (not gated) ✓
16. Backend: POST /api/employees with free_trial plan - employee limit enforcement works (1/5, can add more) ✓
17. Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans returns 4 plans with correct max_employees values ✓
18. Subscription page: Click 'Upgrade' on Starter - plan changes and features unlock (MOCKED payment) ✓

mocked_api.payment_gateway: Razorpay payment is MOCKED - instant verification without real payment

context_for_next_testing_agent: Plan-based feature gating fully tested. PLAN_LIMITS defined in server.py: free_trial (5 emp, basic features), starter (25 emp, +payroll), professional (100 emp, +recruitment/timesheets/projects), enterprise (unlimited, +audit_logs). FeatureGateMiddleware intercepts gated routes and returns 403 PLAN_UPGRADE_REQUIRED. Frontend uses PlanContext with hasFeature() and FeatureGate component. Sidebar shows lock icons via usePlan().hasFeature(). Subscription page shows plan cards with upgrade flow (mocked payment). Audit logs stored in 'audit_logs' collection, viewable only on Enterprise. To test downgrade: update organizations.subscription_plan to 'free_trial' via MongoDB.

subscription_page.upgrade_button: Shows on higher plans, triggers mocked payment

audit_logs.actions_logged: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, GENERATE, APPROVE, REJECT, UPGRADE

sidebar_lock_icons.locked_items: Payroll, Timesheets, Recruitment, Projects, Audit Logs (on free_trial)
sidebar_lock_icons.unlocked_items: Dashboard, Employees, Attendance, Calendar, Leaves, Settings, Subscription
